report.summary: Built 2 new learn guides: Bitcoin Mining Profitability Guide 2026 (936 lines, ~3200 words) and Crypto ETF Options Trading Guide 2026 (688 lines, ~3000 words), both added to PUBLISH_QUEUE.

sections.title: Research Brief
items: Bitcoin mining post-halving economics: block reward halved to 3.125 BTC (Apr 2024), hashrate >800 EH/s, difficulty peaked 155.9T, profitability threshold $0.12-$0.15/kWh, industry consolidating with AI/HPC pivot
Top ASIC hardware benchmarked: Antminer S21 XP+ Hyd (500 TH/s, 11 J/TH) most profitable, ROI 12-18 months in favorable conditions
Crypto ETF options regulatory shift: all major US exchanges removed 25,000 contract position limits, now 250,000+ contracts; FLEX options unlocked for institutional hedging
Key crypto ETFs with options: IBIT (BlackRock BTC), ETHA (BlackRock ETH), FBTC (Fidelity BTC), ETHB (BlackRock staked ETH launched Mar 2026)
IBIT covered call opportunities yielding 0.77%-7.51% returns; $670M crypto ETF inflows on first trading day of 2026

sections.title: Content Created
items: Bitcoin Mining Profitability Guide 2026: 8-section comprehensive guide covering post-halving economics, ASIC hardware comparison table (6 models), electricity costs, mining pools vs solo, AI pivot trend, risks & outlook, 6-question FAQ

Crypto ETF Options Trading Guide 2026: 8-section guide covering regulatory changes, key ETFs comparison table, options strategies (covered calls, protective puts, spreads, iron condors), FLEX options, step-by-step trading guide, DeFi vs ETF options comparison, 6-question FAQ

sections.title: SEO Optimization
items: bitcoin-mining-profitability-guide-2026: target keyword 'bitcoin mining profitability 2026', Article + FAQ schema (6 items), OG + Twitter cards
crypto-etf-options-trading-guide-2026: target keyword 'crypto ETF options trading 2026', Article + FAQ schema (6 items), OG + Twitter cards
Internal linking: both pages cross-link to /learn/crypto-options-trading-guide, /learn/crypto-etfs-guide, /tools/dca-calculator, /learn/advanced-defi-strategies, and related guides
Both pages added to PUBLISH_QUEUE in published-pages.ts
